title: calligonum × squarrosum
intro: Calligonum × squarrosum, also known as Russian shrub or Russian saltwort, is a hybrid plant species in the family Polygonaceae, resulting from the cross between Calligonum comosum and Calligonum rubrum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is reported to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. In herbal preparations, Calligonum × squarrosum is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
